_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

HINDUNILVR.name: HINDUNILVR
HINDUNILVR.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads). Don't read '6/6' as higher conviction than a 4/6 or 5/6 signal. Signals based on 2026-07-13 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial).
